    meson.build:1:0: ERROR: Unknown options: "bash_completion_dir"

    https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/tracker/-/commit/d318ebeb5d4f
    is missing in 2.3.4 unlike 3.1.2 used by sysutils/tracker3.
